title: P0 Swift-CAD implementation understanding
verdict: Preservation and reproducibility prerequisites are complete, but P0 implementation is not complete. The forward goal is the stable-subshape exact-kernel contract integrated through Rupa and verified by the authoritative same-revision gates.
actualP0ExitCriteria: P0 CAD capability vertical slices are complete across source, command, evaluation, selection, UI, Automation, Agent, diagnostics, and tests
Rupa consumes the stable-subshape and explicit-tolerance Swift-CAD contracts without compatibility fallback
Known geometry and kernel regressions are fixed and relevant suites pass
No named valid public-domain input is rejected only because it is outside an implementation envelope
Required same-revision completion evidence is recorded
limitations: Full RupaKit test suite was not run on G0
G2 kernel suite was not run
The G3 preservation checkpoint retains 66 known failing tests
